hero.sub: We help SMEs, Startups, Personal Brands, and Enterprises build modern websites that are fast, secure, and professional.
hero.benefit1_desc: Confused where to start? Tell us your needs, we are ready to help choose the right solution.
hero.benefit2_desc: Suitable for SMEs, new businesses, and personal branding at affordable prices.
hero.benefit3_desc: Modern, neat websites, trusted by customers, crafted by an experienced team.
hero.benefit4_desc: We help from planning until the website is ready to use and accessible to customers.

about.left_brain_text: Represents logic, structured systems, strict backend engineering, performance optimizations, and parameter-hardening security protocols.
about.ideas_text: Represents user experience innovation, sleek visual identities, glassmorphism layouts, custom fluid elements, and rich responsive aesthetics.
about.synergy_text: Together, they create production-grade web systems that compile seamlessly, load instantly, and establish trust at first glance.

philosophy.description: Left Brain Ideas is built on the conviction that the best websites are not built on solid logic or beautiful aesthetics alone, but on a harmonious combination of both. We synthesize strict system engineering precision with stunning visual beauty to help your business scale.

structured.title: Structured Thinking
structured.desc: Every page and feature is logically mapped out using concrete data and smooth user journeys, making your website simple to understand.

intuitive.title: Intuitive Design
intuitive.desc: Sleek, elegant, and modern interfaces. We ensure every visual detail feels comfortable to browse, keeping your visitors deeply engaged.

support.title: Assistance Until Online
support.desc: We guide you through domain setup, server configuration, and website management so your online launch is completely stress-free.

custom_app.title: Custom Web Application
custom_app.desc: Complex platforms tailored to your business logic — secure databases, custom APIs, admin systems, and real-time interfaces built to scale.

web_dev.title: Website Development
web_dev.desc: High-performance platforms engineered with Next.js, React, and TypeScript. Sub-second load times, built to rank.

landing.title: Landing Page
landing.desc: Conversion-focused pages with premium motion, interactive spotlights, and copy frameworks that turn visitors into leads.

company.title: Company Profile
company.desc: Enterprise showcases presenting authority, capabilities, and brand voice with clean, credible aesthetics.

dashboard.title: Dashboard System
dashboard.desc: Real-time metric panels, SVG charts, and admin interfaces at 60 FPS — optimized with smart state management.

uiux.title: UI / UX Design
uiux.desc: Design systems, responsive grids, interactive Figma wireframes, and motion guidelines built for development handoff.

maintenance.title: Website Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Proactive security audits, firewall monitoring, dependency updates, and uptime guarantees — so you never lose sleep.

responsive.title: Responsive Optimization
responsive.desc: Layout restructuring, fluid grid assets, and seamless touch controls ensuring pixel-perfect rendering on every device.

portfolio.heading: Recent Projects
portfolio.sub: A selection of digital products we have designed and engineered.

kala_creative.name: Kala Creative
kala_creative.desc: A high-end creative agency portfolio showcasing visual design, photography, and digital marketing services.

brains_idea_store.name: Brains Idea Store
brains_idea_store.desc: A digital storefront and e-commerce platform offering digital products and creative assets with automated instant delivery.

tedomise.name: Tedomise
tedomise.desc: Official company profile for Tedomise, a technology consultancy specializing in IT solutions and software engineering.

sistem_stok_kkp.name: Sistem Stok KKP
sistem_stok_kkp.desc: An enterprise-grade stock monitoring and inventory tracking system featuring real-time data visualizers and advanced analytics.

kalatrip.name: KalaTrip
kalatrip.desc: A modern travel landing page and tour booking hub with dynamic package explorers and rich travel itineraries.

nike_dashboard.name: Nike Dashboard
nike_dashboard.desc: A high-fidelity dashboard user interface demonstrating e-commerce sales performance, sneaker catalog stats, and user growth.

jurnal_sdm.name: Jurnal SDM
jurnal_sdm.desc: A secure human resources management system designed to track employee attendance, payroll analytics, and evaluations.

gudangin_stok.name: Gudangin Stok
gudangin_stok.desc: An inventory management tool for warehouses to monitor stock incoming, outgoing, and low-quantity alerts in real-time.

feedback.title: What Do You Think?
feedback.subtitle: Your feedback helps us continuously improve our service quality.

why.sub: Every pixel has purpose. Every line of code has intent. We build digital products engineered for real-world performance, security, and growth.

performance.title: Fast Performance
performance.desc: Every millisecond matters. We engineer with Lighthouse 100 targets, edge CDN delivery, and zero-bloat code architecture that loads before your users blink.

security.title: Security First
security.desc: AES-256 encryption, parameterized queries, strict CORS policies, and live threat monitoring baked into every product we ship.

ux.title: Modern User Experience
ux.desc: Interfaces that feel alive. Precision micro-animations, pixel-perfect typography, and intuitive navigation engineered to maximize user engagement.

scalable.title: Scalable Architecture
scalable.desc: Built to grow with your business. Clean component systems, modular APIs, and cloud-native deployment pipelines ensure your platform handles 10 users or 10 million.

process.heading: Our Development Process
process.sub: We work in systematic phases to guarantee structural code security and UI aesthetic elegance.

step1.title: Consultation
step1.desc: We listen to your business vision, discuss technical requirements, and map out the ideal digital strategy for free.

step2.title: Design
step2.desc: Designing a modern, elegant, and user-friendly visual layout that matches your brand identity and captivates your audience.

step3.title: Website Development
step3.desc: Translating designs into real code. We ensure lightning-fast loading speeds, robust responsiveness, and perfect mobile views.

step4.title: Security & Testing
step4.desc: Running comprehensive audits across multiple devices and browsers, while integrating strict security shields to prevent vulnerabilities.

step5.title: Launching & Assistance
step5.desc: Your website goes officially live. We stay by your side to assist with domains, hosting setups, and continuous maintenance.

security.heading: Secure and Worry-Free Websites
security.sub: We ensure your website is fully protected with modern security standards. No need to worry about technical issues, data leaks, or server downtime. Focus on growing your business while we keep your digital storefront safe.

checklist.code: Neat code structure (Makes the website easy to maintain & bug-free)
checklist.speed: Fast loading speed (Keeps visitors engaged & reduces bounce rates)
checklist.data: Data protection shield (Keeps customer info & business data fully locked)
checklist.scale: Scalable framework (Ready for new features as your business expands)
checklist.longterm: Long-term readiness (Built with modern tech that stays relevant for years)

security.status: SCAN COMPLETED: SITE IS 100% SECURE & OPTIMIZED

left.name: Sarah Pratiwi
left.review: At first, I was confused about where to start online. Luckily, the consultation was free and the admin explained everything from scratch. Once the website was ready, it was so beautiful, and shopping on mobile runs super fast.

left.name: Budi Santoso
left.review: Communicating with the Left Brain Ideas team is extremely easy. Every revision was addressed quickly. The resulting company profile exceeded our expectations and looks very professional to our clients.

left.name: Elena Kusuma
left.review: As a beginner in the digital space, I was afraid of managing a website. But they taught me step-by-step. The price is also very affordable for our small clinic, and patients trust us much more now.

left.name: Dedi Hermawan
left.review: I love their super fast response when we faced minor issues at the start. The team was extremely helpful. Now our restaurant looks far more credible to our customers.

right.name: Sophia Siregar
right.review: Our foundation's website is very neat and loads fast when accessed by parents. The revision process went extremely smooth without any misunderstandings. Excellent service.

right.name: Hendra Wijaya
right.review: Making our first website here was very helpful since the team explained things in non-technical terms. Communication was easy via WhatsApp.

right.name: Clara Anindita
right.review: The design has a premium vibe, different from generic templates. This is very important for my fashion brand to look classy. Fast and communicative.

right.name: Joko Prasetyo
right.review: Great service, affordable pricing, and the website quality is top-notch. It really helps our agribusiness look modern and trusted by buyers outside our city.

faq.sub: Everything you need to know before we start building together.

timeline.a: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. A standard landing page or branding project typically takes 1-2 weeks. A full custom website or web application ranges from 3-8 weeks.

revisions.a: Absolutely. We include structured revision rounds in every project package. You'll have the opportunity to review and provide feedback at each major milestone -- design mockup, development preview, and final delivery.

hosting.a: Yes. We can set up and manage hosting on enterprise-grade platforms including Vercel, AWS, DigitalOcean, or a custom VPS depending on your performance and budget requirements.

redesign.q: Can you redesign an existing website?
redesign.a: We specialize in digital transformations. Whether you have an outdated design, poor performance scores, or weak conversion rates -- we can audit your existing platform and deliver a complete rebuild or targeted redesign.

maintenance.a: Yes. We offer flexible monthly maintenance plans that include security patches, dependency updates, performance monitoring, content changes, and priority bug fixes.

contact.sub: Ready to build a premium web app, high-frequency dashboard, or edge company profile? Tell us your requirements and our engineers will calculate a custom project blueprint.
contact.form_placeholder_message: Describe your project, scale expectations and target goals...
contact.success_sub: We received your message and will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.cta_sub: No registration needed · Instantly connect via WhatsApp

footer.desc: We help businesses grow through modern, fast, secure, and easy-to-use websites.
